steps.title: Look for a reversal
steps.content: The hypothesis predicts that hotter habitats should be associated with larger bills. To show the hypothesis is not fully supported, the table needs a case where a larger bill appears in a cooler habitat or a smaller bill appears in a hotter habitat.

steps.title: Match the contradictory data
steps.content:
• Choice A: Describes a small bill in a cool habitat, which fits the hypothesis.
  • Choice B: Does not show a contradiction between bill size and habitat heat.
  • Choice C: Shows a pattern that supports the hypothesis.
  • Choice D: Pairs the largest bill with the lowest warm-month temperature and a small bill with the highest one.
The answer is D.
